calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar May-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Alexander Jones; Jones & Devoy, P.C.; 415-615-0879; appearing via Zoom on behalf of petitioners Justin Kittell, Celmira Blea and Anthony Moss.
Joshua Quaye; Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney; 213-327-3500; appearing via Zoom on behalf of respondent Adrian Santos.

The parties notify the court that a stipulation to binding arbitration was submitted for electronic filing in the afternoon on May 6, 2021, and that respondent's response to verified petition was also submitted late in the afternoon on that same day. The court and the parties confirm that no courtesy copies were delivered prior to today's hearing. The court rules as follows: PETITIONERS JUSTIN KITTELL, CELMIRA BLEA and ANTHONY MOSS' Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator is OFF CALENDAR. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Apr-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator is OFF CALENDAR, no proof of service on file.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Feb-16-2021 Continued To Apr-02-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Respondent Adrian Santos, 415-859-8001 in Pro Per is presnet in the Coourtroom.
No other Appearances.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court informs the Respondent of rules and regulations re: contesting a tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator is continued to April 2, 2021. By no later than March 26, 2021 Petitioner to file a Proof of Service. If there is no proof of service on file, the hearing will be taken off calendar and may be re-noticed upon service.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(501/CFH)

Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Dec-04-2020 Continued To Feb-16-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator is continued to February 16, 2021 per stipulation. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Dec-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS JUSTIN KITTELL, CELMIRA BLEA, AND ANTHONY MOSS' Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on December 4, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. That department hears all real property matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
